content.speakerText: We crushed that project—thanks everyone for pulling through!
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们把项目搞定了！感谢大家的全力付出！
expectedAnswers: No problem! Happy we nailed it.
Thanks for all your hard work—I couldn’t have done it without you.
Really appreciate everyone stepping up. Let’s celebrate soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对团队的感谢和认可
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气真诚
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'appreciate', 'hard work', 'team', 'celebrate' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Let’s celebrate with coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 下周一起喝杯咖啡庆祝一下？
expectedAnswers: Love that idea! I’ll book the table and pick a cozy spot.
Definitely! How about we make it a team lunch instead?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应庆祝提议，表达参与意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，用词自然，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气热情、符合职场社交习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'celebrate', 'coffee', 'team', 'pick a spot' 等场景关键词
